settings.heading: Company uniforms and branded staff apparel in Garland, Texas.
settings.lead: Get quote-ready help for polos, work shirts, hoodies, safety apparel, hats and promotional products for your team.
settings.body:
L F Graphco helps businesses outfit employees with apparel that looks consistent on the job, at events and in customer-facing settings. Choose embroidery for polished polos and caps, screen printing for larger staff shirt runs, DTF for detailed full-color artwork and promotional products for campaigns or employee gifts.

Send your company name, logo, quantity, garment ideas and deadline to start the quote.

settings.heading: Review logo placement before ordering uniforms.
settings.intro: Share your logo and apparel needs so L F Graphco can help review the right production method for your staff.

settings.heading: Uniform programs can combine embroidery, printing and promo items.
settings.intro: Quote apparel for construction crews, restaurants, offices, medical teams, sales staff and local service businesses.

settings.heading: Get company uniform pricing.
settings.intro: Send your company, project type, quantity and deadline. L F Graphco will help move the order toward pricing.
